pi_items.source: Verified against task description instructions ('Enable message editing') and setup/export script API targets (Message_AllowEditing).
Verified against task description instructions ('Restrict message editing to a 2-minute window') and setup/export script API targets (Message_AllowEditing_BlockEditInMinutes).
Verified against task description instructions ('Enable Keep per-message editing history') and setup/export script API targets (Message_KeepHistory).

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for rocket_chat_env configure_message_editing_grace_period task by confirming that the prerequisite settings state is synthetically established via API calls in setup_task.sh. Verified that the expected target values for allowing editing (true), block edit minutes (2), and keeping history (true) exactly match the task description instructions. Additionally, discovered a critical defect: 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the environment, making the task programmatically unscorable.
